• About us
    About us

    PensionDanmark has 851,700 members, who are employed in 20,800 different private and public companies. Our members are covered by collective agreements between 12 labour unions and 30 employer organisations.

    Our DNA

    • Awards
  • Business model
    Business model

    Our mission is to enable our members to have a long and productive working life and to give them a financially secure retirement. We have a tightly knit social safety net which we spread out in the event of illness or death, or if they need early retirement or lifelong learning support.

    Strategy

    • Digitalisation and Data ethics
    Products
    • Pension scheme
    • Insurance
    • Healthcare
    • Lifelong learning
  • Investments
    Investments

    PensionDanmark’s mission is to give our members a profitable return on their savings after tax and inflation to ensure their retirement pension benefits maintain purchasing power. Accordingly, when we invest our members’ savings, we diversify risk
